title: Root Inc (ROOT) Q4 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Root Inc is preparing to announce its fourth-quarter 2024 financial results on February 26, 2025. Analysts anticipate quarterly revenue of approximately $291 million with earnings of negative $0.45 per share. For the full fiscal year 2024, the company is expected to report revenue of $1.14 billion and earnings of $0.07 per share. Looking ahead to 2025, revenue projections have been adjusted downward to $1.21 billion, though earnings estimates have improved to negative $0.37 per share. The insurance technology company notably exceeded expectations in its previous quarter, delivering actual revenue was $305.70 million, which beat analysts' revenue expectations of $272.80 million by 12.06%, and achieved earnings per share of $1.35 against negative expectations of $0.98. Currently trading at $98.08, the stock carries six analyst price targets ranging from $51 to $95 per share, suggesting average downside potential. The consensus recommendation from six brokerages rates the company as Outperform, though GuruFocus analysis indicates significantly deeper downside risk based on its valuation model.
